rulings.Case Title: NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION VS. ALL CLAIMANTS TO SURPLUS FUNDS AFTER TRUSTEE'S SAL

rulings.Case Title: ARVAND SABETIAN VS. MARIELLA MORALES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs MARIELLA MORALES and JASON CHA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Applying calculation method conceded by Plaintiff, the date of termination of tenancy based on February 26, 2016 delivery of the Notice of Intent to Withdraw to the Rent Board as alleged in the First Amended Complaint, is February 26, 2017, not February 25, 2017. Plaintiff fails to explain in opposition why he used February 25, 2016 as the starting point for the calculation. P also fails to provide any argument or authority as to why this error is not fatal.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL WONG VS. ALEXINA NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT ALEXINA NAVARRO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges compliance with SFRO 37.9(c) and 37.9(a)(2)(D).= (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT JAMES SALES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)
